summary: Tested iteration 22 features: Advanced Network Scanning Integration (Port, WiFi, Bluetooth scanners) and WireGuard VPN auto-configuration with split tunnel mode. All 20 backend tests passed. Frontend VPN Integration page loads correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/swarm/vpn/server-config - Returns split_tunnel=true, allowed_ips=10.200.200.0/24
POST /api/swarm/vpn/register-agent - Registers agent and assigns IP in 10.200.200.x range
GET /api/swarm/vpn/agents - Lists registered VPN agents with count
GET /api/swarm/agent/download/v7 - Returns Python script with network scanning classes
Agent v7 contains NetworkScanner class with scan_port, scan_router, get_gateway methods
Agent v7 contains WiFiScanner class with scan_networks method
Agent v7 contains BluetoothScanner class with scan_devices method
Agent v7 contains WireGuardVPN class with split tunnel mode (10.200.200.0/24)
Agent v7 dashboard has Port/Router Scan, WiFi Networks, Bluetooth, VPN tabs
Agent v7 has _perform_network_scans method in monitoring loop
seraph_defender_v7.py exists with NetworkScanner class instantiated
seraph_defender_v7.py has WiFiScanner class instantiated
seraph_defender_v7.py has BluetoothScanner class instantiated
seraph_defender_v7.py has WireGuardVPN class with split tunnel mode
seraph_defender_v7.py has _perform_network_scans method called in monitoring loop
seraph_defender_v7.py dashboard has all new tabs (Port/Router Scan, WiFi, Bluetooth, VPN)
seraph_mobile_v7.py exists
seraph_mobile_v7.py has MobileWiFiScanner class instantiated
seraph_mobile_v7.py has MobileBluetoothScanner class instantiated
Frontend VPN Integration page loads with WireGuard server management UI

response.note: Split tunnel mode - only Seraph traffic routed through VPN

v7.content: Python script with NetworkScanner, WiFiScanner, BluetoothScanner, WireGuardVPN classes

vpn_split_tunnel_verification.note: VPN only routes Seraph network traffic, does NOT block internet

context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 22 features are working: 1) Network Scanning - NetworkScanner, WiFiScanner, BluetoothScanner classes integrated into seraph_defender_v7.py with _perform_network_scans method called every 10 iterations in monitoring loop. 2) WireGuard VPN - WireGuardVPN class with SPLIT TUNNEL mode (only routes 10.200.200.0/24, does NOT block internet). 3) Dashboard has new tabs: Port/Router Scan, WiFi Networks, Bluetooth, VPN. 4) Mobile agent (seraph_mobile_v7.py) has MobileWiFiScanner and MobileBluetoothScanner for Android/Termux. 5) Backend VPN endpoints: /api/swarm/vpn/server-config (returns split_tunnel=true), /api/swarm/vpn/register-agent, /api/swarm/vpn/agents. Frontend VPN Integration page shows WireGuard server management.
